name: New Construction Pre-Drywall Inspection
description: Pre-drywall (mid-build) inspection template — captures framing, rough plumbing, rough electrical, and waterproofing before walls are closed up.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Lot Grading & Drainage was inspected and appears in serviceable condition.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Inspection limited to visible, accessible components at the time of inspection.

defects.title: Repair needed
defects.comment: Lot Grading & Drainage requires repair or further evaluation by a qualified professional.

defects.title: Safety concern
defects.comment: Lot Grading & Drainage presents a safety concern; recommend immediate evaluation and correction.
